cta.title: Ready to Experience Natural Healing?
cta.subtitle: Schedule a consultation to discuss which treatments are right for you. We'll create a personalized plan tailored to your unique health needs.

faqs.answer: Most people feel little to no pain during acupuncture. The needles are hair-thin (much finer than injection needles), and insertion typically feels like a tiny pinch or mosquito bite, if anything at all. Once the needles are in place, most patients experience deep relaxation and many fall asleep during treatment.
faqs.question: Does acupuncture hurt?

faqs.answer: The number of treatments varies depending on your condition, how long you've had it, and how your body responds. Acute conditions may improve in 3-6 sessions, while chronic issues typically require 10-15 treatments or more. We'll develop a personalized treatment plan and adjust it based on your progress.
faqs.question: How many treatments will I need?

faqs.answer: Yes, when provided by a qualified, licensed practitioner. We use sterile, single-use needles and follow strict safety protocols. Chinese herbal medicine has been refined over thousands of years, and we only use high-quality, tested herbs from reputable suppliers. Side effects are rare and typically minor.
faqs.question: Is Chinese medicine safe?

faqs.answer: Absolutely! TCM often complements Western medical treatments very well. Many patients use acupuncture to manage side effects of medications or procedures, support recovery, or address issues that conventional medicine hasn't fully resolved. We encourage open communication with all your healthcare providers.
faqs.question: Can TCM work alongside Western medicine?

faqs.answer: Wear loose, comfortable clothing that can easily be rolled up to access your arms, legs, and back. We have gowns available if needed. Avoid wearing perfume or scented products, as some patients may be sensitive.
faqs.question: What should I wear to my appointment?

faqs.answer: We accept most major insurance plans that include acupuncture coverage. We can provide you with a superbill (detailed receipt) to submit to your insurance company for potential reimbursement. Please contact us to verify your specific coverage. We also offer affordable self-pay rates and package discounts.
faqs.question: Do you accept insurance?

faqs.answer: Eat a light meal 1-2 hours before your appointment (don't come on an empty stomach). Avoid alcohol and excessive caffeine on treatment days. Bring a list of any medications or supplements you're taking, and wear comfortable clothing. Come with an open mind and be prepared to discuss your health history in detail.
faqs.question: How should I prepare for my first visit?

faqs.answer: Many people who are nervous about needles are pleasantly surprised by acupuncture. The needles are extremely thin and insertion is usually painless. We'll go at your pace, explain everything we're doing, and can start with fewer needles if you prefer. We also offer needle-free modalities like herbal medicine, cupping, and Tui Na massage.
faqs.question: What if I'm afraid of needles?

hero.title: Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) Modalities
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive healing therapies tailored to your unique needs

overview.title: Benefits of Our Care Model
overview.introduction: At Dr. Jiang Clinic, we offer a complete range of Traditional Chinese Medicine treatments. Each modality is carefully selected and customized to address your specific health concerns and wellness goals. Our holistic approach combines ancient wisdom with modern understanding to provide effective, natural healing.

items.title: Personalized Plans
items.description: Tailored around your needs and goals

items.title: Acupuncture
items.whatToExpect: At Acupuncture Flushing, you receive a clear plan, treatment pacing, and follow-up guidance. Your visit includes intake, point selection, and a rest phase while needles are retained. Most patients report minimal discomfort and deep relaxation during treatment.
items.fullDescription:
Acupuncture is offered with a warm, family-focused, and structured approach at Acupuncture Flushing.

Acupuncture stimulates specific points to help regulate circulation, calm the nervous system, and support the body's natural recovery processes. Treatment plans are individualized based on your symptoms, health history, and response over time.
items.shortDescription: A core Traditional Chinese Medicine modality using fine, sterile needles to support pain relief, stress regulation, and whole-body balance. Treatment is tailored for both symptom relief and long-term balance.

items.title: Chinese Herbal Medicine
benefits: helps support chronic and functional concerns
items.whatToExpect: At Acupuncture Flushing, you receive a clear plan, treatment pacing, and follow-up guidance. After assessment, you receive a tailored formula and clear dosing guidance. Follow-up visits are used to monitor response and adjust the prescription when needed.
items.fullDescription:
Chinese Herbal Medicine is offered with a warm, family-focused, and structured approach at Acupuncture Flushing.

Chinese herbal medicine combines multiple botanicals in balanced formulas. Prescriptions are adjusted as your condition changes, with attention to symptom patterns, digestion, sleep, and energy levels.
items.shortDescription: Customized herbal formulas selected to match your presentation, constitution, and treatment goals. Treatment is tailored for both symptom relief and long-term balance.

items.title: Cupping Therapy
items.whatToExpect: At Acupuncture Flushing, you receive a clear plan, treatment pacing, and follow-up guidance. You may feel a strong pull or pressure. Temporary circular marks can appear and usually fade over several days.
items.fullDescription:
Cupping Therapy is offered with a warm, family-focused, and structured approach at Acupuncture Flushing.

Cupping uses negative pressure to mobilize soft tissue and improve local blood flow. Techniques may be static or moving, depending on your condition and comfort.
items.shortDescription: Suction-based therapy used to release muscle tightness, support circulation, and ease stagnation-related discomfort. Treatment is tailored for both symptom relief and long-term balance.

items.title: Moxibustion
items.whatToExpect: At Acupuncture Flushing, you receive a clear plan, treatment pacing, and follow-up guidance. You experience gentle, sustained warmth with close practitioner monitoring for comfort and safety.
items.fullDescription:
Moxibustion is offered with a warm, family-focused, and structured approach at Acupuncture Flushing.

Moxibustion applies therapeutic heat to selected points to warm channels and support qi movement. It is commonly used for cold sensitivity, fatigue, and certain chronic patterns.
items.shortDescription: Warming therapy using mugwort heat at targeted points to support circulation, energy, and cold-pattern conditions. Treatment is tailored for both symptom relief and long-term balance.

items.title: Tui Na Medical Massage
benefits: helps support joint and soft-tissue mobility
Helps reduce neck, shoulder, and back tension
items.whatToExpect: At Acupuncture Flushing, you receive a clear plan, treatment pacing, and follow-up guidance. Treatment intensity can be adjusted from gentle to firm. Sessions are tailored to your tolerance and clinical goals.
items.fullDescription:
Tui Na Medical Massage is offered with a warm, family-focused, and structured approach at Acupuncture Flushing.

Tui Na uses structured hand techniques along channels and affected areas to reduce tension, improve movement quality, and support rehabilitation goals.
items.shortDescription: Manual Chinese medicine bodywork combining acupressure and mobilization techniques for pain and function support. Treatment is tailored for both symptom relief and long-term balance.

items.title: Gua Sha
items.whatToExpect: At Acupuncture Flushing, you receive a clear plan, treatment pacing, and follow-up guidance. A lubricated area is treated with controlled strokes. Temporary redness may appear and usually resolves in a few days.
items.fullDescription:
Gua Sha is offered with a warm, family-focused, and structured approach at Acupuncture Flushing.

Gua Sha applies repeated strokes with a smooth-edged tool to address tight tissue and stagnation. It is often selected for neck, shoulder, and upper back tension patterns.
items.shortDescription: Instrument-assisted scraping technique used to release fascial tension and improve circulation in targeted regions. Treatment is tailored for both symptom relief and long-term balance.

items.title: Chinese Dietary Therapy
benefits: Adapts to seasonal and individual needs
items.whatToExpect: At Acupuncture Flushing, you receive a clear plan, treatment pacing, and follow-up guidance. You receive clear food priorities, cooking-direction guidance, and simple habit updates that align with your treatment plan.
items.fullDescription:
Chinese Dietary Therapy is offered with a warm, family-focused, and structured approach at Acupuncture Flushing.

Dietary recommendations are tailored to symptom pattern, digestion, and lifestyle realities. Plans focus on easy-to-follow adjustments that are sustainable and culturally flexible.
items.shortDescription: Food-as-medicine guidance based on TCM pattern differentiation, constitution, and seasonal context. Treatment is tailored for both symptom relief and long-term balance.

items.title: Lifestyle & Wellness Counseling
items.whatToExpect: At Acupuncture Flushing, you receive a clear plan, treatment pacing, and follow-up guidance. You receive focused, actionable steps between visits with follow-up on adherence, barriers, and measurable progress.
items.fullDescription:
Lifestyle & Wellness Counseling is offered with a warm, family-focused, and structured approach at Acupuncture Flushing.

Lifestyle counseling translates TCM principles into easy-to-follow routines for rest, pacing, movement, and stress regulation. Recommendations are personalized and adjusted as progress changes.
items.shortDescription: Structured guidance on sleep, stress, activity, and recovery habits to improve long-term treatment outcomes. Treatment is tailored for both symptom relief and long-term balance.
